items.title: This piece is one of the best stories I've read this year as far as a reporter skillfully and compelling telling a story.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
This piece is one of the best stories I've read this year as far as a reporter skillfully and compelling telling a story. 

The story? A charitable Ohio woman offered her home to two people who she later found out ... were wanted for murder in Maryland.

STORY: www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/202...

media.title: An Ohio woman took in two strangers. Then she saw their ‘wanted’ photos.
media.description: In an era of declining trust, Adrienne Behrman, 49, took a chance on a couple she hoped to help.
